# LibraryPlaylistCreationRequest.Relationships.Parent

**Object**

Library playlist folder which contains the playlist that the user creates.

## Declaration

```swift
object LibraryPlaylistCreationRequest.Relationships.Parent
```

## Related Objects

- **LibraryPlaylistCreationRequest.Relationships.Parent.Data**: Data of the library playlist folder which contains the created library playlist that the user creates.

## Related Objects

- **LibraryPlaylistCreationRequest.Relationships.Tracks**: The songs and music videos to add to the created playlist’s tracklist.
